title: Docker release publish options
description: Implementation details of `nx release publish`. Do not invoke directly with `nx run` when version data is required.

buildTargetName.description: Name of the Docker build target whose metadata tags should be reused during publish.

buildTargetConfiguration.description: Optional build target configuration from which metadata tags should be read before falling back to target options.

dryRun.description: Whether to run the command without actually publishing the image to the registry.
